title: eDNA Extraction Using Phenol-Chloroform-Isoamyl Alcohol
author: Abigail Wells
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bx4ypqxw

steps.title: heat-shock Filters in 2 mL of...
steps.instruction: heat-shock Filters in 2 mL of at 95 °C for 00:05:00, min and then allow samples to cool to room temperature Longmire lysis buffer by Ana Ramón-Laca

steps.title: digestion add 100 µL proteinase K...
steps.instruction: digestion add 100 µL proteinase K (final concentration 1 mg/mL )

steps.title: phase lock set up add ca
steps.instruction: phase lock set up add ca. 800 µL of vacuum grease with a syringe onto the wall of the 5ml tube without touching the lysate to avoid cross-contamination Eppendorf 5415R Refrigerated Centrifuge (Refrigerated Centrifuge, Eppendorf, EP-5415R, https://s3.amazonaws.com/protocols-files/private/ad988454678565d60fe90becdfcaa2e7bb2d68837cdf1a66e7e6147c0debe85e/ce49be3ax.jpg )

steps.title: add 2 ml of phenol-chloroform-isoamyl (25:24:1)...
steps.instruction: add 2 ml of phenol-chloroform-isoamyl (25:24:1) pH 8 pH is critical for good results

steps.title: shake well and centrifuge 13300 x...
steps.instruction: shake well and centrifuge 13300 x g, 4 °C, 5 minutes

steps.title: place ca
steps.instruction: place ca. 800 µL of vacuum grease in 2 sets of empty tubes for CI. (These can be prefilled for convenience)

steps.title: add 2
steps.instruction: add 2.2 mL of chloroform:isoamyl 24:1 and decant aqueous layer from step 6. Important!! only add the chloroform just before use (while the tubes with PCI are in the centrifuge) so it does not affect the phase lock if grease is at the bottom.

steps.title: shake well and centrifuge 13300 x...
steps.instruction: shake well and centrifuge 13300 x g, 4 °C, 5 minutes

steps.title: add 2 mL of isopropanol (can...
steps.instruction: add 2 mL of isopropanol (can be prefilled for convenience), add 80 µL of 5 Molarity (M) NaCl and decant aqueous layer from step 11

steps.title: pour liquid off slowly and add...
steps.instruction: pour liquid off slowly and add 800 µL of ice cold 70 % (v/v) EtOH

steps.title: shake well and centrifuge 13300 x...
steps.instruction: shake well and centrifuge 13300 x g, 4 °C, 5 minutes and go to step #15

steps.title: pour liquid off slowly and allow...
steps.instruction: pour liquid off slowly and allow tubes to dry for 1 h or until dry

steps.title: once they are dry, resuspend in...
steps.instruction: once they are dry, resuspend in 100 µL TE buffer (warm 37 °C to favor elution)
